<!-- source-hash: 45dbd15c360e8189ad1e9802f7aee706 -->
Response DTO that encapsulates aggregated filter options and counts for device list filtering operations, used to populate filter UI components with available facets.

## Key Components

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `statuses` | `List<DeviceFilterItem>` | Available device statuses with counts |
| `deviceTypes` | `List<DeviceFilterItem>` | Available device types with counts |
| `osTypes` | `List<DeviceFilterItem>` | Available OS types with counts |
| `organizationIds` | `List<DeviceFilterItem>` | Available organization IDs with counts |
| `tagKeys` | `List<TagFilterItem>` | Available tag keys with counts |
| `filteredCount` | `Integer` | Total number of devices matching current filters |

Lombok annotations (`@Data`, `@Builder`, `@NoArgsConstructor`, `@AllArgsConstructor`) generate boilerplate. OpenAPI `@Schema` annotations document each field for Swagger UI.

## Usage Example

```java
DeviceFilterResponse response = DeviceFilterResponse.builder()
    .statuses(List.of(
        new DeviceFilterItem("online", 42),
        new DeviceFilterItem("offline", 15)
    ))
    .deviceTypes(List.of(
        new DeviceFilterItem("workstation", 30),
        new DeviceFilterItem("server", 27)
    ))
    .osTypes(List.of(
        new DeviceFilterItem("Windows", 40),
        new DeviceFilterItem("Linux", 17)
    ))
    .organizationIds(List.of(
        new DeviceFilterItem("org-001", 35)
    ))
    .tagKeys(List.of(
        new TagFilterItem("env", 22)
    ))
    .filteredCount(57)
    .build();
```
